purpose: Fresh bounded local Canny quality matrix variant: slightly softer prompt language and a different seed to test whether the cleaned Canny control remains stable without harsh edge or collar artifacts.

request_patch_values.positive_prompt: hyperrealistic cinematic editorial portrait, natural skin texture with fine pores, subtle human skin asymmetry, realistic eyes with clean catchlights and visible iris detail, gentle eye fill light, open shadow detail, detailed natural hair, edge-guided but natural composition, coherent face silhouette, clean but not over-sharpened jawline, separated neck and shirt collar, tailored dark blazer over textured shirt, clothed shoulders, soft natural fill light, balanced exposure, calm neutral interior background, clean face with no painted marks, lifelike lens rendering
request_patch_values.negative_prompt: cartoon, anime, illustration, plastic skin, waxy skin, over-smoothed skin, beauty filter skin, airbrushed face, over-sharpened edges, dark edge halos, harsh outlines, black contour stains, distorted anatomy, extra fingers, missing fingers, deformed hands, crossed eyes, low resolution, blurry, watermark, text, colored blotches, paint marks, over-dark eyes, underexposed eyes, muddy shadows, crushed shadows, smeared jawline, warped collar edge, control map stains, bare shoulders, strapless top, nude, unclothed torso
